description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 29 hrs 13 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 13 mins. His tracked work was split mainly across Java, Other, and Markdown, and WakaTime recorded activity across 6 projects. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repos recorded this week.
